product: Change default workspace access to Consumer access (Public Preview)
tagline: Workspace admins can configure new users to receive Consumer access by default using group cloning.
what_it_does: Workspace admins can configure new users to receive Consumer access by default using group cloning. Consumer access provides access to Genie One, a view only experience for business users who must view and interact with dashboards, Genie Spaces, and apps without creating workspace objects. The process creates a new group for existing users and updates the users group to grant only Consumer entitlement to new users by default.
why_it_matters: This preserves existing users' authoring permissions while streamlining consumer onboarding at scale.
plain_summary: Workspace admins can configure new users to receive Consumer access by default using group cloning. Consumer access provides access to Genie One, a view only experience for business users who must view and interact with dashboards, Genie Spaces, and apps…
key_takeaway: Workspace admins can configure new users to receive Consumer access by default using group cloning.
